privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated spacecraft data for a fictional Stardust-2 sample return capsule, injected via setup_task.sh. The expected initial spec path, GMAT script path, and report paths match the explicit shell script and verifier definitions. The required stopping altitude (120.0 km), target radius of periapsis (6418.14 km), and inclination (45.0 deg) explicitly match the task description instructions and the numerical constraints evaluated within verifier.py.
